prompt: For a heritage inventory, identify the authoritative body responsible for the Eastmere Choral Hall in Eastmere, then fetch an official design dossier or property register that names its original lead architect. Do not substitute the builder or a later restoration architect. Also say whether that record names the structural engineer; if it does not, write “structural engineer: not stated” rather than guessing.
